spec: Hologram OS — canonical login gateway: rEFInd → Plymouth → SDDM (real theme run by the Holo QML engine) → PrimeOS, authenticated by a self-sovereign key bound to local hardware (holospaces docs/08; Laws L1/L4/L5), 100% serverless

the QML ENGINE runs the real Main.qml → DOM (welcome · username · password · Login/Shutdown/Restart)
the real theme's images paint (wallpaper Background + rectangle.png panel)
the greeter is rooted in this machine (hostName derived from the machine-id κ)
browser login flow completed without throwing
